    8. Killer Email Newsletters To Inspire You (For Your Own)
</h2>

  <!-- Attachment Blocks -->
<!-- DEBUG: attachments.count=2 -->

  <!-- DEBUG: attachment.id=66042185, kind=text -->
  <div class="lecture-attachment lecture-attachment-type-text" id="lecture-attachment-66042185">
    <div class="attachment-data"></div>
    
      <div class="attachment-data"></div>
<div class="lecture-text-container">
<p></p><p>When you're REALLY creative, you're creative with EVERYTHING you touch.</p><p>Especially in the way you communicate with your fans.</p><p>You make every part of life another aspect of your art.</p><p>Here's a list of people who have decided that living an artistic life means NEVER running through the motions.</p><p>They've made email their bitch.</p><p>Follow them. You can always unsubscribe if it's not your thing.</p><p>But I bet you you won't...</p><p><br class="softbreak"></p><h2>Leftzets Letter - Music Business</h2><p><a href="https://lefsetz.com/wordpress/" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">https://lefsetz.com/wordpress/</a></p><p>3 emails a week about the music industry from a music lawyer. Everyone who is anyone in the industry is subscribed to it. Artists, producers and labels. </p><p><br class="softbreak"></p><h2>Drawing Links - Illustration</h2><p><a href="https://substack.com/@drawinglinks" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">https://substack.com/@drawinglinks</a></p><p>Edith realized at some point that emails would be a great way of sharing her daily cartoons.</p><p><br class="softbreak"></p><h2>Austin Kleon - Inspire Artists</h2><p><a href="https://austinkleon.com/newsletter/" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">https://austinkleon.com/newsletter/</a></p><p>The guy who wrote the book 'Steal Like An Artist' has a newsletter. Do I need to say more?</p><p><br class="softbreak"></p><h2><strong>Lorde - Musician</strong></h2><p><a href="https://www.lorde.co.nz/sign-up" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">https://www.lorde.co.nz/sign-up</a></p><p>So poetic. Proof that when you're creative, it spills into everything. When she's promoting something, I don't even notice.</p><p><br class="softbreak"></p><p><br class="softbreak"></p><h1><strong>KILLER MYSTERY SCHOOL ⭐️ STUDENT EMAIL NEWSLETTERS (They're all great, that's why I'm sending you there. This is not a charity.)</strong></h1><p><br class="softbreak"></p><h1><strong>TOP 5 </strong></h1><p><br class="softbreak"></p><h2>1. Karima Hassan - Painting</h2><p><a href="https://www.karimahhassan.com/" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">https://www.karimahhassan.com/</a></p><p>Karimah is taking her community of "gremlins" along for a ride where she questions everything and brings home a new truth every Sunday.</p><p><br class="softbreak"></p><h2>2. Lauren Klein - Illustration / Writing</h2><p><a href="https://www.fruitstains.com" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">https://www.fruitstains.com/</a></p><p>Lauren has made illustration and writing become one. By combining these art forms, she has created a neurotic, off-kilter experience. These emails will give you solace knowing that at least someone out there is more fucked up than you are.</p><p><br class="softbreak"></p><h2>3. Burr Capsule - Fashion</h2><p><a href="https://mailchi.mp/3f6965bb17c5/burr-capsule" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">https://mailchi.mp/3f6965bb17c5/burr-capsule</a></p><p>Burak attempts to break "email newsletters" every week. It's a punk rock mirror to what he's lining up to do in the fashion world.</p><p><br class="softbreak"></p><h2>4. Alienbroadcast Transmissions - Analog Collage</h2><p><a href="https://hannahhaddix.kit.com/yeshello" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">https://hannahhaddix.kit.com/yeshello</a></p><p>Not for the faint of heart. If you're easily offended, stay away. (Or maybe Hannah's world is exactly what you need to help wake you up from your people-pleasing normie default state.)</p><p><br class="softbreak"></p><h2>5. Sizzy Rocket - Musician</h2><p><a href="https://www.sizzyrocket.com/" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">https://www.sizzyrocket.com/</a></p><p>The underdogs needed a voice. Now they have it. ⚡️⚡️<br class="softbreak"></p><p><br class="softbreak"></p><h2>If you have your own "newsletter" (or you're planning to start one), email me to get my special 'ART OF EMAIL' secrets.</h2><p><br class="softbreak"></p><p></p>
</div>
